scripts.test: npm run build && k6 run --env ENV=dev dist/tests/api/todos-api/health.test.js && k6 run --env ENV=dev dist/tests/api/todos-api/todos.test.js && k6 run --env ENV=dev dist/tests/flows/todo-lifecycle.test.js
